description: supabase-vector-gmailkb-rag-class regression-guard. Supabase Edge Function uses SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (full DB access bypassing RLS) and Deno.serve(...) with NO auth check on the incoming request. Anyone with the function URL gets full RLS bypass. After F-EDGE-FUNCTION-AUTH-1 the new edge-function-auth-checker scanner detects this pattern as CRITICAL.
